task_completion.description: Verify the study_package directory was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output (e.g., mkdir, ls) or file manager showing the directory /home/ga/Videos/study_package/ exists.

task_completion.description: Verify three speed-adjusted video variants were created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal (ls) or file manager showing three new video files in the study_package directory, typically named to indicate 0.75x, 1.5x, and 2.0x speeds.

task_completion.description: Verify seven keyframe snapshots were extracted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal or file manager showing exactly seven image files (e.g., .jpg or .png) in the study_package directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the MP3 audio version was produced.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal or file manager showing an .mp3 file in the study_package directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the structured JSON manifest was generated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal or file manager showing a .json file in the study_package directory, and ideally a text editor or cat command showing its structured contents.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually processed the media using appropriate tools (like ffmpeg) rather than creating dummy files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal history showing ffmpeg commands with complex arguments for speed adjustment (e.g., atempo, setpts), audio extraction (-b:a 192k), and frame extraction (-vf fps=...).

integrity.description: Verify the generated files are actual media files and not empty.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal output (like ls -lh) or file manager showing non-zero file sizes for the generated videos, images, and audio.

integrity.description: Verify the JSON manifest contains actual data reflecting the generated files.
integrity.visual_evidence: If the JSON file is visible, it should contain specific filenames and metadata corresponding to the deliverables, not just placeholder text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The source video is a 90-second clip. The agent must use tools like ffmpeg to create three speed-adjusted videos (0.75x, 1.5x, 2.0x) with pitch-preserved audio, extract exactly seven keyframe images at 15-second intervals, extract a 192kbps MP3 audio file, and create a JSON manifest. All outputs must be saved in /home/ga/Videos/study_package/.
